title: balaniella pedicellaris
intro: Balaniella pedicellaris, also known as the 'butterfly orchid', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Balaniella pedicellaris include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Balaniella pedicellaris is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
